from gcjp.mission_graph import TaskGraphBuilder
g = TaskGraphBuilder(segment_id="seg_1c_003", assigned_actors=["fleet_1"])
g.declare_segment_meta(assumed_conditions=["mission_start"])
g.add_task("t1_recon_a", actor="fleet_1", action="reconnaissance", target="target_A", duration_lb=2.0, required_capability=["recon_capable"], energy_cost=3.0, ammo_cost=0)
g.add_task("t2_strike_a", actor="fleet_1", action="strike", target="target_A", duration_lb=1.5, required_capability=["strike_capable"], energy_cost=5.0, ammo_cost=1, condition="target_A_confirmed")
g.add_dependency("t1_recon_a", "t2_strike_a", relation="condition_trigger", condition="target_A_confirmed")
built = g.build()
